query: SELECT id, name, email, externalId, programId, consultorId, bypassOnboarding, cadastradoPorAdmin FROM alunos WHERE email LIKE '%@test.com' OR name LIKE 'Test %' OR name LIKE 'Aluno Direto Test%' ORDER BY id DESC;
